hypothesis: IF every sub-receipt in E12-E19 (a) parses, (b) observes proposer≠attestor, (c) claims no authority, (d) records zero kernel/schema/emitter mutation, AND the tranche's regression_check shows delta_failing ≤ 0, THEN the tranche SHIPS and opens the option to request E21-E23.

open_seams.SEAM-001-C12: test_legacy_schemas_directory_is_purged remains the single open blocker. E15 established the 13 ORPHAN_ZERO_REF baseline; a future delete tranche (under HAL review) could collapse this.

note: E20 is the sovereign-adjacent ship gate for tranche E13-E22. It reviews all 8 sub-receipts (E12-E19; E12 predates the tranche but was admitted as the replay-gate seed), computes the tranche cum_hash, verifies every PULL and HAL invariant, and declares SHIP. The tranche closes here. E21-E23 are not automatically opened — they require a fresh hypothesis and fresh HAL-gate signal. The two open seams (SEAM-001-C12 and Knowledge Compiler V2 ratification) are surfaced for the next MAYOR allocation decision.
